finalFailures: Axe desktop dashboard has critical/serious violations: unlabeled dev floating button and insufficient color contrast.
Axe RU mobile drawer has critical/serious violations: unlabeled dev floating button and insufficient purple badge/link contrast.
Generic retired section /en-EN/not-a-real-section returns HTTP 200 instead of 404/redirect.
passedChecks: npm run test:run -w partner passed: 121 files / 670 tests
npm run test:mobile-layout -w partner passed: 1 file / 5 tests
Desktop active reseller owner: grouped nav visible, reseller link visible, aria-current on dashboard, no horizontal overflow, no token-like strings
Desktop analyst/R1: READ ONLY badge visible and reseller link hidden
RU mobile needs_info drawer: action/limited/read-only badges visible, focus trap/Tab/Escape/focus return and route-click close passed, no horizontal overflow, no token-like strings
Route smoke with curl: portal legacy commerce -> /en-EN/finance; storefront dashboard and storefront legacy admin -> /en-EN
